stemHtml: A crew is requested by ATC to descend. They select a lower altitude and set throttle to idle, but mistakenly leave the autopilot in Altitude Hold Mode leaving the airspeed to gradually decrease. The crew do not notice the decreasing speed. What will happen to the angle of attack in this situation?

options.a: The angle of attack increases and there is a risk of stalling
options.c: The angle of attack increases but there is no risk of stalling
